fields.acceptance_criteria: All 11+ theme presets ported (Cinder, Frost, Blood Moon, Verdant, Void, Amber Terminal, Ocean Abyss, Elysium, Sakura, Solarized Dark, Solarized Light, High Contrast); ThemeColors (49 properties) exported as CSS variables on :root; EffectSettings (38 properties) drive GPU uniforms; Theme selection persists and applies globally; Theme button in header opens settings overlay
fields.title: Feature: Complete theme system — colors, effects, presets, CSS variables

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. ThemeColors struct with all 49 color properties injected as CSS custom properties on :root. 2. All 17 presets (Cinder, Frost, Blood Moon, Verdant, Void, Amber Terminal, Ocean Abyss, Elysium, Sakura, Solarized Dark, Solarized Light, High Contrast, Copper Dusk, Arctic, Neon Noir, Parchment, Emerald Night) loaded dynamically from backend as preset files — not compiled into WASM. 3. GPU-active CSS overrides: :root.gpu-active block with transparent backgrounds, brightened text, saturated accents for glass readability. 4. Theme button in header bar (not in Settings tab) that opens a full ThemeSettings overlay/modal. 5. ThemeSettings overlay with collapsible sections: presets grid, backgrounds (5 pickers), text (3), borders (2), accents (5), log levels bg (5), log levels text (5), span badges (2), GPU toggle, particle controls (4 types with toggles + color pickers + sliders), cinder palette (toggle + 4 colors + size), smoke (toggle + 3 colors + sliders), glass (2 sliders), CRT (toggle + sliders + color). 6. EffectSettings with all 38 properties driving GPU uniforms. 7. Selecting a preset loads both ThemeColors and EffectSettings. 8. Individual color changes update CSS vars in real-time. 9. localStorage persistence of current theme state.
fields.interview_answers: Q1: All 17 presets. Presets should be simple files delivered dynamically by the backend — not hardcoded in the WASM binary. Q2: Full per-color-property editing with all 49 color pickers across collapsible sections. Q3: Save/load/export/import split into separate ticket.
fields.title: Feature: Complete theme system — colors, effects, presets, CSS variables
